summary.text: Historical data is provided by Tiingo. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF (SPY) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US large- and mid-cap stocks selected by the S&P Committee. SPY was launched on Jan 22, 1993 and is issued by State Street.

data.title: Stock Market Today: SPY, QQQ Retreat on Iran’s New Threat ahead of Trump’s Primetime Address

holdings.infoBox: SPY is an equity ETF with a total of 505 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.63%, Apple at 7.21%, Microsoft at 4.49%, Amazon.com at 3.75%, and Alphabet at 3.20%.
